seoDescription: Humble ISD 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 13 first day, May 29 last day, student/teacher break, Thanksgiving, winter break, spring break, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Humble ISD starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 13, 2025 and ends on May 29, 2026. Student/Teacher Break runs October 13-17, Thanksgiving Holiday runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. February 9-10 are listed as inclement weather days that may become school days if time is lost to bad weather.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Humble ISD start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Wednesday, August 13, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Humble ISD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Humble ISD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 29, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: What are Humble ISD inclement weather days in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: February 9 and February 10, 2026 are listed as inclement weather days and may become school days if time is lost to bad weather.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 13, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is May 29, 2026.
